originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__codec_hw_write_7` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&codec_hw_write` is never used.
presenceCondition:
(and (or (and (not CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642) CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642)
         CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642)
     (or (and (not CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642) CONFIG_I2C CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642)
         (and CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 CONFIG_I2C)))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_I2C () Bool
  true)
reasoning: codec_hw_write is assigned at L24 inside ak4642_init (SOC_AK4642 AND I2C path) but never read — genuine dead store. The // ERROR at L24 marks a different VBDB-known bug (null function call when I2C=F); the dead store of codec_hw_write is a new bug. PC = (FSI_AK4642 OR SOC_AK4642) AND I2C simplifies to SOC_AK4642 AND I2C (FSI_AK4642 implies SOC_AK4642 via derived macro). Correctly constrained, no library macros.
